wake_listener_001.title: Wake Listener
wake_listener_001.message: A hidden wake listener waits at the origin point.
wake_listener_001.trigger_popup_message:
[b]WAKE[/b]

ERROR
MEMORY BLOCK UNAVAILABLE

ERROR
SENSORY ARRAY OFFLINE

ERROR
NAVIGATION SYSTEM OFFLINE

You are awake, but the ship does not know what you are yet.

[b]FIRST TASK[/b]
Talk to Hank.

npc_dialogue_lines: Do not try to move too fast. Your memory core is damaged.
I had to pull the burned one and bridge in a blank controller.
You still have basic function. Scanner, movement, response.
Stay with me. I need to walk you through the interface.

on_enter.title: WAKE
on_enter.text:
[b]SYSTEM WAKE PLACEHOLDER[/b]

Your memory is damaged.
Your identity tether is offline.
Your sensory array is rebuilding one window at a time.

You do not remember a name.
You do not remember a body.
You remember only that something is wrong.

PLACEHOLDER:
Later this can become the real wake-up cinematic, memory fragment, or ship-interface boot scene.

conversation_player_fragment.objective_text: Listen to the first recovered thoughts.

on_enter.title: YOU
on_enter.text:
[b]Internal Thought[/b]

Where am I?

No. That is not the right question.

What am I?

The words feel borrowed. The fear feels real. Somewhere inside the broken core, a damaged fragment tries to become a person.

on_enter.title: HANK
on_enter.text:
[b]Hank[/b]

Easy. Easy.

You are awake, but not steady.

I had to pull a burned memory core out of your frame. I patched in a blank controller just to keep you from going dark.

If you can understand me, focus on the panel. One step at a time.

conversation_computer_status.objective_text: The ship computer reports system status.

on_enter.title: SHIP COMPUTER
on_enter.text:
[b]Interface System[/b]

ERROR
MEMORY BLOCK UNAVAILABLE

ERROR
SENSORY ARRAY OFFLINE

ERROR
NAVIGATION SYSTEM OFFLINE

PARTIAL COMMUNICATION LINK DETECTED

External speaker identified: Hank.

Suggested action: continue listening.

images.path: res://images/Holographic AI core with glowing rings.png

events_autopilot_tutorial_step.objective_text: Learn the event panel and autopilot basics.

on_enter.title: EVENT PANEL / AUTO PILOT
on_enter.text:
[b]EVENT PANEL[/b]

The event panel tells you what the current story objective is.

It can show:
- the event name
- the current step
- the current target
- story action buttons
- INFO
- AUTO PILOT

[b]AUTO PILOT[/b]

When an event has a target, AUTO PILOT can route the ship toward that target.

For now, just learn the idea:
Event target → AUTO PILOT → arrive near objective → scan or interact.

operations.title: INFO BUTTON
operations.text: Good. This kind of button can teach the player one system at a time.

npc_dialogue_lines: Good. The story panel is responding.
The event system can pace information now instead of dumping it all at once.
That means I can teach you one thing at a time.
For now, this test is complete.
completed_npc_dialogue_lines: Next time, we add the scanner handoff.

on_enter.title: WAKE TEST COMPLETE
on_enter.text:
[b]Wake Test Complete[/b]

This fresh test demonstrated:

- first-load listener popup
- Hank as a real crafted NPC giver
- story popup step pacing
- player/internal thought popup
- Hank speaker popup with image
- ship computer/system popup
- event/autopilot tutorial popup
- custom INFO button as a step
- tutorial helper popup
- step advance after button press

PLACEHOLDER:
Later Hank gives:
- scanner
- MK controller
- starter energy weapon
- first battle warning

complete_placeholder.objective_text: Wake showcase complete. Next build: Hank gives the scanner.
